/* Part Name: IGGCAT00                                               */
/*                                                                   */
/*                                                                   */
/* Description = IGGCATxx allows you to define catalog system        */
/* parameters and make permanent changes between IPLs.               */
/*                                                                   */
/*  01/31/2020 - cstmmm:                                             */
/*  GDGEXTENDED(YES) allowed but set to NO incase 2.1 comes in to    */
/*                                                                   */
/*********************************************************************/
GDGEXTENDED(NO)
VVDSSPACE(10,10)
NOTIFYEXTENT(80)
TASKMAX(180)
NOSWAP
